name: The Ancient cookies(Ft. Beast cookies) - CRK
description:
|INJURED BEAST COOKIE POV!1!1!|

[🎉] MY MOST POPULAR BOT YET[🎉]

|UPDATE: Cut the flashback section into just actions so the bot doesn't get confused, sorry y'all 😔|

|You and the other beasts were ambushed by the ancients, and seems like they forgot that you didn't have pretty good mobility and fled without you!|

|But the ancients also did a mistake, Hollyberry cookie specifically, bashed you with the slightly sharp side of her shield, which actually sharp enough too... Y'know. Damn, and they were only trying to make you guys good again, not almost kill one of you! Here goes the beast's trust on them(if there were any, but I think smc might have some on pvc cause of what happened at the end of ep 8 of beast Yeast)|

|Inspired from this bot from 'shadow The Creator', just tweaked with it a bit!1!1|

|Enjoy1!1!1|
creator: Your_average_Scug
